trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close above EMA20 ($71,635.40) after retesting support
confluence_signals: EMA bullish alignment (price above all EMAs)
Open Interest rising with price (trend continuation)
Fear & Greed Index at Extreme Fear (contrarian buy)
Negative funding rate (shorts paying longs) with rising OI (potential squeeze)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Strong bullish momentum (EMA, MACD, OI) combined with contrarian signals from Fear & Greed and negative funding rate suggest upside. Overbought 1h RSI and Hyperliquid Smart Money bearishness are noted but outweighed by structural bullishness and contrarian sentiment.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close above EMA20 ($2,211.49) after retesting support
confluence_signals: Fear & Greed Index at Extreme Fear (contrarian buy)
Strong correlation with BTC's bullish structure
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Bullish momentum and price action, aligned with BTC's overall trend and contrarian Fear & Greed. However, overbought 1h RSI, accelerating negative funding velocity, and Hyperliquid Smart Money bearishness reduce conviction slightly.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close above EMA20 ($600.85) after retesting support
confluence_signals: EXTREME bearish funding rate (0th percentile) indicating short squeeze fuel
Binance trading at a discount, suggesting arbitrage buying pressure
Fear & Greed Index at Extreme Fear (contrarian buy)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: A confluence of strong contrarian bullish signals (extreme funding, Binance discount, F&G index) combined with positive momentum indicators (EMA, MACD) provides high conviction despite short-term underperformance and overbought 1h RSI.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close above EMA20 ($82.70) after retesting support
confluence_signals: Funding Velocity accelerating positive (shorts paying more, squeeze building)
Fear & Greed Index at Extreme Fear (contrarian buy)
Strong correlation with BTC's bullish structure
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Bullish momentum (MACD, funding velocity) and overall market sentiment (F&G, BTC correlation) support a long. However, conflicting EMA 1h alignment and neutral Hyperliquid Smart Money signals introduce some uncertainty, leading to a moderate win rate.

results.cross_asset_insight: The market is in an upward trend, with BTC leading highly correlated altcoins. Extreme Fear sentiment suggests contrarian buy opportunities, particularly for assets like BNB exhibiting strong short-squeeze potential.
